_comment: Karl Lite Fine-Tuning Config. Run: python -m karl_finetune.train_lora configs/finetune_config.json
_notes: For 4GB VRAM: set load_in_4bit=true, batch_size=1, lora_r=8
For CPU only: set batch_size=1, gradient_accumulation_steps=16, epochs=1
For RTX 3070 laptop: load_in_4bit=true works well with lora_r=16
Run --dry-run first to validate config without using GPU/tokens
Format your dataset first: python -m karl_finetune.format_dataset data/train.jsonl --template alpaca
